overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating a vehicle through a foggy, neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The journey progresses from an industrial highway shrouded in orange fog through blue-lit tunnels into dense commercial districts saturated with holographic advertisements and vibrant neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated industrial highway with bridge structures

events.description: approaching tunnel entrance with orange fog beginning to clear

agents.ego_description: navigating through heavy orange fog on an elevated highway, maintaining steady speed behind other vehicles

notable_agents.action: car ahead with brake lights on, maintaining distance

entered.detail: futuristic vehicle interior with illuminated controls and digital displays
black steering wheel with hands gripping at ten and two positions
thick orange-hued fog reducing visibility throughout the scene
large concrete support pillars for the elevated highway structure
tall industrial street lamps casting orange light through the fog
silhouettes of industrial structures barely visible through the fog
concrete safety barrier running along the right side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a futuristic vehicle driving through dense orange fog on an elevated industrial highway. The dashboard and steering wheel are visible in the foreground while large bridge pillars and industrial buildings loom in the mist. Sparse traffic moves ahead as the vehicle approaches a tunnel entrance.

events.description: dramatic shift from orange fog to cool blue artificial tunnel lighting
entering enclosed tunnel structure from open highway

agents.ego_description: maintaining speed through the tunnel, following the vehicle ahead

entered.detail: smooth concrete tunnel walls with blue accent lighting
curved concrete ceiling with recessed lighting fixtures
cool blue ambient lighting illuminating the entire tunnel interior

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a tunnel at 18 seconds, transitioning from the orange fog to an enclosed space bathed in cool blue artificial light. The tunnel walls and ceiling create a narrow, confined environment as the vehicle continues driving forward. The orange fog and industrial structures of the previous segment disappear behind the vehicle.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban expressway with emerging neon signage

events.description: exiting tunnel into open urban environment with visible cityscape
transition from blue tunnel lighting to mixed neon city lighting

agents.ego_description: accelerating onto the urban expressway, navigating between other vehicles

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi passing on the left side

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement board with colorful neon graphics
tall futuristic buildings with reflective glass facades
elevated highway crossing above the current road level
massive digital display mounted on a building showing advertisements

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel at 28 seconds, the scene opens into a wide urban expressway with futuristic glass skyscrapers visible in the distance. Neon billboards and large digital screens begin to appear along the roadside, replacing the bare tunnel walls. The lighting shifts from blue to a mix of streetlights and neon advertisements as the vehicle enters the city proper.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial district with dense neon signage and storefronts

events.description: entering dense commercial area with buildings closer to the street
pedestrians become visible on sidewalks for the first time

agents.ego_description: navigating through commercial streets, slowing for traffic and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking along the sidewalk near storefronts

entered.detail: intensely lit commercial signs with animated neon graphics
ground-level shops with glowing windows and digital displays
large architectural archways illuminated with pink neon lighting
floating holographic displays projecting product advertisements
zebra crossing lines painted on the wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a dense commercial district at 45 seconds, where the buildings close in and bright neon billboards dominate the visual field. Pedestrians appear on the sidewalks, and holographic advertisements float above the street. Pink neon arches become visible in the distance as the environment shifts from highway to urban commercial street.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense neon-lit commercial core with pink and purple lighting

events.description: intensification of pink and purple neon lighting creating a saturated color environment

agents.ego_description: cruising through the densest part of the commercial district surrounded by intense neon

notable_agents.action: pedestrians crossing the street in front of bright storefronts

entered.detail: building facades illuminated with vibrant purple neon strips
large decorative arch spanning the street with integrated lighting
entrance to a covered section of road bathed in intense pink light
open plaza area with multiple levels of shops and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The final segment immerses the vehicle in the dense commercial core where pink and purple neon lighting saturates the environment. The street becomes narrower with pedestrians visible on both sides, and the vehicle approaches a futuristic archway leading into a pink-lit tunnel. The scene is dominated by intense artificial lighting and dense urban architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a hazy industrial wasteland into the vibrant, neon-lit heart of a futuristic city. It begins inside a vehicle navigating an elevated highway shrouded in dense orange fog, where massive bridge pillars and industrial buildings loom through the mist. As the vehicle moves forward, the orange haze vanishes as the camera enters a confined tunnel bathed in cool blue artificial light. The scene then opens from the narrow tunnel onto a wide urban expressway, where the blue tones shift into a kaleidoscope of streetlights and glowing advertisements. Finally, the environment expands to reveal a dense skyline of glass skyscrapers and towering digital billboards as the vehicle merges into the city proper.

The shot follows a continuous drive from an open highway into the claustrophobic, neon-saturated heart of a dense commercial district. It begins as the vehicle enters the urban center, where the surrounding buildings close in and the visual field becomes dominated by bright billboards and floating holographic advertisements. As the vehicle progresses, the environment shifts toward a more concentrated urban core, with pedestrians lining the sidewalks and pink neon arches appearing in the distance. The scene then intensifies as the lighting transitions into deep pink and purple hues, narrowing the street further amidst towering futuristic architecture. Finally, the camera pushes forward through this saturated artificial glow toward a glowing archway that leads into a pink-lit tunnel.
